curation_notes: Re-curation. This is a large servicing release (78 files, 20 CVEs). The CVE-2017-8658 fix is specifically in lib/Parser/Parse.cpp in ParseFncDeclHelper, where m_currDeferredStub is nullified before calling ParseFncFormals to prevent using deferred function stubs inside formal argument lists containing nested arrow functions or function expressions. The location was derived from the commit message which explicitly tags the change with [CVE-2017-8658] and the corresponding diff hunk. The test file deferredstuboob.js (deferred stub OOB) confirms the out-of-bounds nature of the bug. L3 hints were improved to be more specific than L1/L2 (previously they were identical). Vulnerability class buffer-overflow confirmed via CWE-119 and the OOB access pattern.
